metadata.description: Multi-backend ACP plugin suite. Each plugin is named for its host and drives the OTHER two backends via stateless CLI runners.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Installed in Gemini; drives Codex and Claude backends via stateless CLI runners.

plugins.name: claude
plugins.description: Installed in Claude Code; drives Codex and Gemini backends via stateless CLI runners.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Installed in Codex CLI; drives Gemini and Claude backends via stateless CLI runners.
